dashboardSelectPortHint: Select a port from the header to load dashboard data.
jettyLiveNoPermission: You do not have permission to view Jetty Live CCTV. Ask an admin to enable View Jetty Live stream under At-Berth Executions in Role Management.
jettyLiveHealthUnreachable: Cannot reach stream health API. Is the RTSP helper running?
jettyLiveProxyHint: Using dev proxy (/jetty-live-stream → stream HTTP, /jetty-live-ws → MPEG WebSocket). Ensure rtsp-stream-viewer is on ports 3080 / 9999.
jettyLiveNoCameraUrl: No camera URL in this link. Configure an RTSP link in Master – Jetty, or open Jetty Live from the allocation schematic.
jettySchematicNoCctv: There's no CCTV on this jetty
jettyLiveStreamStruggling: The stream helper is running but no video frames are arriving. Check VPN/network access to the camera, confirm the RTSP URL in Master – Jetty, and try Reconnect. On the stream server host, test: ffmpeg -rtsp_transport tcp -i "<your-rtsp-url>" -t 5 -f null -
masterJettyIntro: Jetties from API (per port). Used when selecting a jetty on shipping instructions.
reportingIntro: Select a report to view. Use date range and optional vessel or jetty filters where applicable.
reportingDailyDesc: End-to-end activities from Vessel Arrived (TA) until Vessel Cast Off / Sailed. Header, timelog, and progress loading/unloading.
reportingVesselDesc: Jetty utilization, allocation by jetty, and full vessel detail for the selected port. Filter by date range and jetty.
masterIntro: Manage master data for ports, jetties, and SI dropdowns.
adminIntro: User management and RBAC: users and roles.
qualityCardLead: FFA, DOBI, IV per shipment. Compare loading quality to discharge quality.
loadingPageListIntro: Select a {{purpose}} operation to record survey, quality check, quantity check, and final checks.
loadingPurposeMismatch: This operation is <bold>{{apiPurpose}}</bold>. Open it under the correct section:
masterHubPortDesc: Add and manage master port / site data.
masterHubJettyDesc: Add and manage master jetty options per port (used when selecting a jetty on shipping instructions).
masterHubJettyLayoutDesc: Define how jetties are arranged in the Jetty Schematic for each port.
masterHubSiTermDesc: Add and manage trade terms (Terms) for Shipping Instructions.
masterHubSiShipperDesc: Add and manage shippers for Shipping Instructions.
masterHubSiLoadingPortDesc: Add and manage loading ports for Shipping Instructions.
masterHubSiSurveyorDesc: Add and manage surveyors for Shipping Instructions.
masterHubSiAgentDesc: Add and manage agents for Shipping Instructions.
masterHubSiCommodityDesc: Commodities for Shipping Instructions, plus standard pumping rate (MT/h) and buffer per commodity for SLA.
masterHubFreightTermsDesc: View currently fixed freight terms used by the SI module.
adminHubPartnerApiDesc: Provision and revoke API keys for external systems that submit Shipping Instructions.
qualityUploadNote: Upload CPO analysis (mock): use real upload when backend is connected.
clearanceNoOperations: No operations in this queue yet. Pending sign-off appears after berth teams request sign-off; Ready to Sail after approval.
cargoOpsSubtitle: Add one or more load segments: quantity, start, and end for each. Segment rate is quantity ÷ (end − start) for that line. Entries must not overlap and starts must increase. Balance is SI primary quantity minus loads already recorded on other cargo activities.
cargoOpsSubtitleShort: Record load segments with quantity, start, and end. Use the help (i) button for rules and rates.
cargoOpsQtyCargoInlineHint: No cargo quantity on the linked shipping instruction yet. Open the SI and enter quantity on its cargo / breakdown lines. QTY Cargo is read from the SI only, not from this form.
cargoOpsBasisMissingHint: No cargo quantity is stored on the linked shipping instruction yet. Open the SI and add cargo line(s) with quantity (breakdown). Totals here use that SI data only.
cargoOpsLinesMin: Add at least one load entry with quantity, start, and end.
cargoOpsLineTimeInvalid: Entry {{n}}: start or end time is invalid.
cargoOpsLineEndAfterStart: Entry {{n}}: end must be after start.
cargoOpsLineStartBeforeActivity: Entry {{n}}: start must be on or after the activity start time.
cargoOpsLineOverlap: Load segments must not overlap (next start must be on or after previous end).
cargoOpsLineStartStrict: Entry start times must be strictly increasing.
cargoOpsRateHint: Rate = this line’s quantity ÷ hours from this line’s start to end (MTPH).
cargoOpsMovedInvalid: Enter a positive quantity for this segment.
executionsLogCargoGroupHint: {{count}} saved load segments — expand to see each entry.
